message:
fix(node): shrink default binary compile surface to fix rch timeout (bd-3uf8)

The crate was timing out during remote cargo check (exit 137 after ~301s).
Two changes reduce the compile surface dramatically:

main.rs: Replace opaque `mod api` and `mod policy` declarations with
inline #[path] module declarations that enumerate only the specific
submodules actually used by the binary. This avoids compiling the entire
api and policy module trees for the default binary target.

migration/mod.rs: Gate bpet_migration_gate and dgis_migration_gate behind
#[cfg(any(test, feature = "extended-surfaces"))] since they are only
needed during tests.

Result: all-targets check dropped from ~301s timeout to ~189s completion,
warning count from 521 to 93.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
